title: Mega Sponge
description: Empty large water spaces and wash with a single click
body:
![Sponges](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OeDXWKYF/images/c9373fa10842bff6bb0d11e5cf3686ccd747c2c8.png)
This mod adds 9 new sponges to empty large spaces where there is water or lava. The mod removes water, lava, kelp, seagrass, and various types of coral (except corals blocks).

All sponges are single-use; right-clicking on them will turn them into wet sponges.
